packages.name: qa-gate
packages.description: Independent QA audits: tasks reaching review get a one-shot auditor that re-verifies the criteria; failures bounce back with findings. Ships its own QA-officer agent you can chat with.

packages.name: session-bell
packages.description: Notifications when any session finishes or asks for input; adds a ping_all_sessions tool for Master.

packages.name: cost-pulse
packages.description: Live per-session spend bar chart as a tab.

packages.name: kanban-lite
packages.description: The built-in kanban board as a pure addon (proof of the addon platform).
